real_prompts.prompt: Build a CRM with login, contacts, pipeline, role-based access, admin analytics, and Stripe payments
Project management SaaS with workspaces, kanban boards, time tracking, team roles, and billing
E-commerce marketplace with seller dashboard, product catalog, cart, checkout, reviews, and admin panel
LMS with courses, video lessons, quizzes, certificates, student and instructor roles, and payments
Healthcare patient portal with appointments, prescriptions, doctor and patient roles, and notifications
Real estate listing platform with property search, favorites, agent profiles, and inquiry system
Social network with posts, follows, DMs, notifications, and content moderation for admins
Restaurant ordering system with menu management, cart, orders, kitchen dashboard, and delivery tracking
HR management tool with employee profiles, leave requests, payroll, and org chart
SaaS analytics dashboard with data source connections, charts, team workspaces, and Stripe billing

edge_cases.prompt: Build me an app for my team
Make it free but also paid, everyone is admin but also restricted
Build a simple todo app with lists and tasks
Users can see their own data and also everyone else's data
Build a payments and invoicing system
B2B SaaS with multi-tenancy, SSO, RBAC, and audit logs

Build an app with login, register, admin and user roles, dashboard for each role, profile editing, item management where users create items and admins delete them, items have name description and status
Build a website for tracking my cat's emotional journey through Tuesdays
Build a GraphQL API with Redis caching and WebSocket support for real-time chat
